name: 09 Feishu Notify
description: Callable post-write notification branch: after a Vault write, push high-value summaries to Feishu as Card JSON 2.0 group-bot message cards when should_notify=true and FEISHU_WEBHOOK_URL is configured. It never exposes the webhook URL in downstream JSON.

parameters.jsCode:
return [
  {
    json: {
      item_id: 'example-feishu-notify',
      source_type: 'rss',
      source_name: 'Example Feed',
      source_display_name: 'Example Feed',
      title: 'Example high-value item',
      published_at: new Date().toISOString(),
      canonical_url: 'https://example.com/high-value-item',
      summary: '\u8fd9\u662f\u4e00\u6761\u7528\u4e8e\u9a8c\u8bc1\u98de\u4e66\u5373\u65f6\u6458\u8981\u901a\u77e5\u683c\u5f0f\u7684\u793a\u4f8b\u6458\u8981\u3002',
      reason: 'notify_score \u548c confidence \u8fbe\u5230\u9608\u503c\uff0c\u56e0\u6b64\u5e94\u5728\u5199\u5165 Obsidian \u540e\u63a8\u9001\u98de\u4e66\u3002',
      vault_path: '00_Inbox/Signal_To_Obsidian/example.md',
      vault_write_status: 'written',
      vault_write: 'written',
      dedupe_action: 'full_push',
      should_notify: false,
      notification_mode: 'full',
      ai_score: {
        keep_score: 86,
        notify_score: 88,
        reference_score: 82,
        action_score: 61,
        confidence: 0.86,
        decision_hint: 'keep_full'
      }
    }
  }
];
